theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The user explicitly requested a 3-color palette with black as main, blue as secondary, and white as an accent (specifically for outlines). This aligns perfectly with a high-contrast, tactical database look suitable for a gaming guide that requires dense data visualization (Fish database, multipliers).

color_palette.tailwind_config_instructions: Override CSS variables for dark mode: --background to 0 0% 0%, --foreground to 0 0% 100%, --primary to 221 83% 53% (Blue), --border to 0 0% 100% with varying opacity, and heavily utilize white/20 for structural card borders as requested.

typography.notes: Do not use Inter for headings. Ensure tight letter spacing on all headings. Data tables must use tabular-nums for aligned numbers (e.g., multipliers, tiers).

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for marketing/hero sections, but dense 'Control Room Grid' for the Fish Database and Mutation tables (p-4, gap-4).

grid_modes.home_hub: MODE A: TETRIS GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps) for high visual impact.
grid_modes.database_ui: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps) for Zone Navigation and Data Cards.

spacing_and_layout.containers: All grid containers must use 'border-collapse' style or structural outlines. Add p-6 inside bordered cards to avoid text collision.

surface_strategies.cards_and_databases: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). bg-black or bg-[#0A0A0A] with crisp 1px solid border-white/20. No soft shadows. Rely on sharp outlines.
surface_strategies.headers: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and a sharp border-b border-white/20.
surface_strategies.interactive_elements: Hover states should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity to border-white/50 or switch border to brand blue (#2563EB).
surface_strategies.data_tables: Use 1px white/10 borders between rows. Header row should have border-b border-white/30.

component_rules.shadcn_customization: Heavily customize Shadcn components to remove the 'default Vercel' look. Strip rounded-md where appropriate to use sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to fit the technical game guide theme.
component_rules.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-500. Secondary buttons: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/30 hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5.
component_rules.fish_search_panel: Use a prominent, wide search input with a white/20 outline. On focus, outline turns solid blue. Consider a command-palette style (cmdk) for instant fish results.
component_rules.zone_navigation: Sidebar or top tab navigation. Use sharp rectangular tabs. Active tab gets a solid white or blue bottom/left border.
component_rules.gallery_carousel: Use Embla Carousel (already in package.json). Images should have sharp white borders. Next/Prev buttons should be stark white outlines.
component_rules.faq: Use Shadcn Accordion. Customize with border-b border-white/20.
component_rules.mobile_menu: Use Shadcn Sheet component. Ensure all links are touch-friendly. Background must be solid black with white outline separators.

animation_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text and border colors on hover. Example: hover:border-white hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200.
animation_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in for database rendering to prevent harsh flashes.
animation_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Rows in the Fish Database should highlight (e.g., bg-white/5) on hover to aid reading across columns.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight for high legibility in dense database views.

images_and_media.rule: Only use the provided images. Never use placeholders. Maintain aspect ratios. For the gallery, you can reuse these images if actual game screenshots aren't provided.

hero_deep_sea.description: Abstract dark deep sea underwater environment with bioluminescent blue elements.
hero_deep_sea.usage: Main Home Page Hero Background (use bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text readability).

diving_bell.description: Submarine/diving bell in deep oceanic abyss with blue lights.
diving_bell.usage: Zone Navigation Feature Image or Rebirth Guide Hero.

abstract_waves.description: Geometric blue water waves on black background, wireframe glowing style.
abstract_waves.usage: Texture overlay for empty states, footer background, or database container backgrounds (low opacity).

glowing_fish.description: Minimalist underwater scene with a bright blue glowing fish.
glowing_fish.usage: Fish Database header image or featured mutation image.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all blue text on black background meets 4.5:1 ratio. White outlines ensure structural boundaries are visible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (Search inputs, Zone Links, Accordion Triggers, Carousel Buttons) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='fish-search-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts (@fontsource/outfit, @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans) and configure them in Tailwind.
Force dark mode via Tailwind 'dark' class on the HTML/Body element or configure Next-Themes to default to dark.
Build the Fish Database utilizing Shadcn Table for structured data, wrapped in a card with a sharp white/20 border.
Implement the Layout with a global Navigation header (sticky, glassmorphism) and a robust mobile off-canvas menu.
Ensure the layout strictly follows the 3-color user requirement: Black background, Blue primary actions/highlights, White text and outlines.
Apply 'white as the accent color for like outline' by utilizing border-white/20, border-white/40, or solid white borders for focus rings and container edges.
Do NOT use generic rounded borders; use rounded-none or rounded-sm to maintain the sharp, tactical gaming interface look.
